title: subscribe
description: Sent by a viewer to declare interest in a space, establishing an interest lease. The server MUST choose a lease duration between 30000 and 60000 ms inclusive and communicate the absolute deadline via `ack.body.lease.expires_at`. If this is the space's first active lease (transition from zero interested viewers to one or more), the server MUST notify every connected source device with a `command{origin: server, action: resume_rate}` (see SPEC.md 'Interest lease'). subscribe on a connection that already holds a lease replaces it (equivalent to unsubscribe immediately followed by subscribe with the new topics).

topics.description: Restricts which reliable/best-effort event kinds the server forwards under this lease. Omitted or empty means all topics.
